The '''Hidden Bek Base''' was the headquarters of the [[Hidden Beks]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]]. Located in the [[Lower City]] of the planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], it was run by [[Gadon Thek]] by [[3956 BBY]]. The base contained a large central room and several areas restricted to visitors, including a room connected to the main base by an elevator in which Gadon made his quarters.

When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Carth Onasi]] came to the Lower City during their [[Rescue of Bastila Shan|mission]] to rescue [[Bastila Shan]], they visited the base and were greeted by Gadon and his bodyguard [[Zaerdra]]. Gadon told Revan that the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]], a rival gang led by [[Brejik]], had enslaved Bastila and stole the Beks' [[Prototype accelerator|swoop accelerator]], which they needed to win the annual [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop]] tournament.

[[File:BekBase.jpg|thumb|left|The layout of the Hidden Bek Base.]]

To help win Bastila's freedom, Revan broke into the [[Black Vulkar Base]], found the accelerator, and returned it to Gadon. After the race and the ensuing skirmish, in which Brejik had been killed, Gadon retreated to his quarters to mourn Brejik's death.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player character, as Revan, chooses the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark-side]] path in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', he or she accepts the offer of [[Kandon Ark]], a [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkar]], to race in the annual [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop]] tournament for the Black Vulkars. To do so, Revan is charged with the task of assassinating Gadon for the Vulkars. He or she breaks into a restricted area, causing the Beks to become hostile. Revan then enters Gadon's quarters and assassinates him and his bodyguard [[Kaeira]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
